title: coaching — model relationships
description: Four owned entities: CoachingProfile, CoachAssignment, CoachCertification, CoachSkillRating. Every row carries `tenant_id` (CASCADE) per tenancy-columns.md §3. NEVER `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id` (branch cascades through profile.branch_id), or `scope_node_id` — forbidden per §5. Every outbound FK stays same-tenant per defense-in-depth.

internal.description: One profile → many ratings across different ratables.

outbound.description: Every coaching profile is tenant-scoped per tenancy-columns.md §3.
The parent Staff. RESTRICT — cannot hard-delete a Staff while a coaching profile references it. Offboarding cascades via the DeactivateCoachingProfileOnStaffOffboarded hook.
Coach's primary branch. RESTRICT — branch archive is refused while a coaching profile references it (staff module already guards this via BelongsToBranch).
Primary sport reference. RESTRICT — cannot deactivate a Sport while any active profile references it. Nullable — a coach may not have a declared primary sport (e.g. general fitness).
The coach being assigned. RESTRICT — profile hard-delete blocked while assignments reference; soft-delete cascades to CancelActiveAssignmentsOnCoachingProfileDeactivated.
Polymorphic. Same-tenant enforcement lives in the observer (returns COACH_ASSIGNMENT_CROSS_TENANT on mismatch).
Audit trail — the User who created the assignment.
The profile that holds this certification. CASCADE — certifications have no meaning without their profile. Purge-at-retention protected — the row survives profile deactivation.
SET NULL on User archive so audit trail survives.
Polymorphic against sports/registry. Same-tenant not applicable — the registry is platform-scoped (tenant_id nullable). The observer validates is_active=true on the referenced row.
The rater. RESTRICT — cannot hard-delete a User whose ratings still exist (SET NULL alternative rejected — the rater identity is audit-critical).

inbound.description: Downstream modules read coaching entities through the SDK + through the sports/session module's head_coach_id reference. No inbound FK from other modules today except the polymorphic morph_to on assignable/ratable.
examples: sports/session::Session — carries `head_coach_id` referencing CoachingProfile (single primary coach) + this module's CoachAssignment tracks the many-to-many for stacking assistants
sports/attendance (Wave 4) — reads coaching_profile_id for check-in eligibility; assignment lookup via CoachAssignmentRepository
sports/team::Team (Wave 3+) — head_coach_id references CoachingProfile for the team's head coach; assignments track the multi-coach roster
notifications (Wave 4+) — session-coach-change alerts route through user::User → staff::Staff → coaching_profile.notify_on_rating preferences
growth::analytics (Wave 5+) — reads rating events for coach performance metrics
inbound.onDelete: N/A — no inbound FKs from other modules. Polymorphic references are same-tenant defense-in-depth checked by the observer.

morphs.description: The thing being coached. Enforced string enum in the assignable_type column: 'Session' | 'Team' | 'Event'.
The skill dimension being rated. Enforced string enum in the ratable_type column: 'Sport' | 'Discipline' | 'Position'.

accessor_chain.description: Presentation accessors delegate to related aggregates for uniform display.

CoachAssignment.is_active: deleted_at IS NULL AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > now())
CoachAssignment.assignable_summary: polymorphic - resolves to a short title of the Session/Team/Event

CoachCertification.is_expired: expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < now()

CoachSkillRating.is_current: deleted_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())

notes: CoachingProfile carries `application_id` INDIRECTLY via its Tenant. Enforced by tenancy-compliance-auditor.
CoachingProfile.branch_id is direct — but that's the STAFF-inherited branch scoping pattern (BelongsToBranch trait). Not a shortcut; branch is the coach's home.
CoachAssignment.assignable inherits its branch cascade through the assignable's own branch_id.
CoachSkillRating.ratable references the sports/registry catalog. Registry rows are platform-scoped (tenant_id nullable) — never a cross-tenant leak from registry.
CoachingProfile.staff_id + tenant_id are IMMUTABLE post-create — enforced by observer.
There is NO `Coach` model. Coach IS Staff. `CoachingProfile` is the sport-domain satellite that marks a Staff as an active Coach.
